headline: US High Growth Tech Stocks To Watch For Potential Expansion
summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has risen 1.9%, contributing to a 24% increase over the past year, with earnings forecasted to grow by 15% annually. In such a dynamic environment, identifying high growth tech stocks involves looking for companies that demonstrate strong innovation potential and scalability to capitalize on these favorable market conditions.

headline: Ondas Expands Into Stratospheric Intelligence With Palantir Defense Platform Bet
summary: Ondas has completed its acquisition of World View Enterprises, expanding into stratospheric intelligence and surveillance capabilities. The company is launching a unified, AI enabled multi domain defense platform in partnership with Palantir Technologies. The transaction and new platform aim to integrate persistent, layered intelligence across air and ground domains for defense and security operations. Ondas, trading on NasdaqCM:ONDS, is moving beyond its core wireless and automation roots...
